compiled_state.title: Add relates_to link suggestion to Part C scan in epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description

Extend the Part C (Shared Artifact Impact Analysis) section in plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md to suggest relates_to links when cross-epic artifact overlap is discovered.

### Implementation Steps

1. **After Part C scan completes**: When Part C finds consumers (covered or uncovered), add a new subsection that checks for cross-epic overlap:
   - Query all open epics via ticket CLI: .claude/scripts/dso ticket list filtered for type=epic, status=open
   - For each open epic (excluding the current one and its children), check if its Success Criteria or description references any of the same artifact files discovered in Part C
   - If overlap is found, compose a relates_to link suggestion

2. **Suggest relates_to links**: For each overlapping open epic, present to the user:
   - The overlapping epic ID and title
   - The shared artifact files
   - A recommendation to create a relates_to link
   - Use AskUserQuestion with approval/decline options

3. **User approval gate**: Present the suggestion and wait for user approval:
   - If approved: create the link via .claude/scripts/dso ticket link <current-epic-id> <overlapping-epic-id> relates_to
   - If declined: log the decline and continue

4. **Open-only filter**: Only suggest relates_to links to epics with status=open. Exclude closed and archived epics at query time.

### File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md (modify — add relates_to suggestion after Part C scan)

### Constraints
- This is a safeguard file edit — authorized by task-level instructions targeting the Part C scan
- Preserve all existing Part C behavior — the relates_to suggestion is additive
- User approval is mandatory before link creation (no autonomous linking)
- Only suggest links to open epics

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md contains relates_to link suggestion section after Part C
  Verify: grep -q "relates_to" plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] Section includes user approval gate
  Verify: grep -q "AskUser\|user.*approv\|confirm.*before" plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] Section filters for open epics only
  Verify: grep -q "status=open\|status.*open\|open.*epic" plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] Section references ticket link command for relates_to
  Verify: grep -q "ticket link.*relates_to\|relates_to.*link" plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md
- [ ] All structural boundary tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-epic-scrutiny-pipeline-relates-to.sh

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md (modified, Part C relates_to suggestion added). Tests: 4 pass, 0 fail.
